title: Missing Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
description: Without details on RBAC implementation, users could potentially gain unauthorized access to sensitive resources or escalate their privileges.  This is compounded by the lack of information on authentication mechanisms.
affected_component: Application Servers, Database Servers, System Services
attack_vector: Exploiting vulnerabilities in the system to gain elevated privileges, misconfigured permissions.
mitigations: Implement a robust RBAC system to control user access to resources.
Regularly review and update user permissions.
Utilize privilege separation techniques to minimize the impact of a compromised account.
